title: Assistant Store Manager - Lifestyle Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Lifestyle Advisory Limited - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Lifestyle Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lifestyle Advisory Limited:
Lifestyle Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lifestyle Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
